tEn: Emerging Properties in Unified Multimodal Pretraining
tZh: 统一多模态预训练中的涌现特性
sEn: BAGEL, a unified decoder-only model pretrained on trillions of tokens from interleaved multimodal data, exhibits emerging capabilities in complex multimodal reasoning, significantly outperforming open-source unified models.
sZh: BAGEL是一个统一的仅解码器模型，在来自交错多模态数据的数万亿token上预训练，展现出复杂多模态推理的涌现能力，显著优于开源统一模型。
absEn: Unifying multimodal understanding and generation has shown impressive capabilities in cutting-edge proprietary systems. In this work, we introduce BAGEL, an open-source foundational model that natively supports multimodal understanding and generation. BAGEL is a unified, decoder-only model pretrained on trillions of tokens curated from large-scale interleaved text, image, video, and web data. When scaled with such diverse multimodal interleaved data, BAGEL exhibits emerging capabilities in complex multimodal reasoning. As a result, it significantly outperforms open-source unified models in both multimodal generation and understanding across standard benchmarks, while exhibiting advanced multimodal reasoning abilities such as free-form image manipulation, future frame prediction, 3D manipulation, and world navigation. In the hope of facilitating further opportunities for multimodal research, we share the key findings, pretraining details, data creation protocal, and release our code and checkpoints to the community. The project page is at https://bagel-ai.org/
absZh: 统一多模态理解与生成在前沿专有系统中展现出令人印象深刻的能力。本文介绍BAGEL，一个原生支持多模态理解与生成的开源基础模型。BAGEL是一个统一的仅解码器模型，在来自大规模交错文本、图像、视频和网络数据的数万亿token上预训练。当使用如此多样化的多模态交错数据进行扩展时，BAGEL在复杂多模态推理中展现出涌现能力。因此，它在标准基准测试中显著优于开源统一模型的多模态生成和理解，同时展现出高级多模态推理能力，如自由形式图像操作、未来帧预测、3D操作和世界导航。为了促进多模态研究的更多机会，我们分享了关键发现、预训练细节、数据创建协议，并向社区发布了我们的代码和检查点。项目页面位于https://bagel-ai.org/。

items.en: Unifying multimodal understanding and generation has shown impressive capabilities in cutting-edge proprietary systems. In this work, we introduce BAGEL, an open-source foundational model that natively supports multimodal understanding and generation. BAGEL is a unified, decoder-only model pretrained on trillions of tokens curated from large-scale interleaved text, image, video, and web data. When scaled with such diverse multimodal interleaved data, BAGEL exhibits emerging capabilities in complex multimodal reasoning. As a result, it significantly outperforms open-source unified models in both multimodal generation and understanding across standard benchmarks, while exhibiting advanced multimodal reasoning abilities such as free-form image manipulation, future frame prediction, 3D manipulation, and world navigation. In the hope of facilitating further opportunities for multimodal research, we share the key findings, pretraining details, data creation protocal, and release our code and checkpoints to the community.
items.zh: 统一多模态理解与生成在尖端专有系统中展现了令人印象深刻的能力。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 BAGEL，一个原生支持多模态理解与生成的开源基础模型。BAGEL 是一个统一的、仅解码器模型，在从大规模交错文本、图像、视频和网络数据中精选的数万亿 token 上进行了预训练。当使用如此多样化的多模态交错数据进行 Scaling 时，BAGEL 在复杂多模态推理中展现出涌现能力。因此，它在标准基准测试中显著优于开源统一模型的多模态生成和理解能力，同时展现出高级多模态推理能力，如自由形式图像操作、未来帧预测、3D 操作和世界导航。为了促进多模态研究的更多机会，我们分享了关键发现、预训练细节、数据创建协议，并向社区发布了我们的代码和检查点。

items.en: The field of unified multimodal understanding and generation has witnessed a surge in interest, with numerous research projects [68, 57, 73, 70, 88, 79, 83, 66] demonstrate promising results in jointly optimizing generation and understanding benchmarks with a crafted unified architecture. While several efforts [1, 11, 70] attempt to scale up their unified models, they are still trained predominantly on image-text paired data from standard image generation and understanding tasks. Recent research [10] has revealed a substantial gap in unified multimodal understanding and generation between academic models and proprietary systems such as GPT-4o and Gemini 2.0, whose underlying techniques remain undisclosed. We argue that the key to close this gap lies in scaling with carefully structured multimodal interleaved data - integrates texts, images, videos and web sources. Our experiments reveal emerging properties as the interleaved multimodal pretraining scales up. Beyond enhancing core multimodal understanding and generation capabilities, the scaling also facilitates complex compositional abilities such as free-form visual manipulation and multimodal generation with long-context reasoning, paving the way for a broad spectrum of advanced functions.
items.zh: 统一多模态理解与生成领域引起了广泛关注，许多研究项目 [68, 57, 73, 70, 88, 79, 83, 66] 展示了通过精心设计的统一架构联合优化生成和理解基准测试的有前景结果。尽管一些工作 [1, 11, 70] 尝试扩展其统一模型，但它们仍然主要基于标准图像生成和理解任务中的图像-文本配对数据进行训练。最近的研究 [10] 揭示了学术模型与专有系统（如 GPT-4o 和 Gemini 2.0，其底层技术尚未公开）之间在统一多模态理解与生成方面的显著差距。我们认为，缩小这一差距的关键在于使用精心构建的多模态交错数据进行 Scaling——整合文本、图像、视频和网络来源。我们的实验揭示了随着交错多模态预训练的扩展而出现的涌现特性。除了增强核心多模态理解和生成能力外，Scaling 还促进了复杂的组合能力，如自由形式视觉操作和具有长上下文推理的多模态生成，为广泛的高级功能铺平了道路。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Showcase of the versatile abilities of the BAGEL model.
items.capZh: 图 1: BAGEL 模型的多功能能力展示。

items.en: To realize this vision, we established a new protocol for scalable data sourcing, filtering, and construction of high-quality multimodal interleaved data. In addition to the web source, we incorporate video data that naturally provides pixel-level, conceptual, temporal, and physical continuity, which offers exclusive signals essential for acquiring grounded world knowledge at scale. Moreover, our interleaved format inherently includes tasks such as multimodal conversation, text-to-image/video, and image manipulation, enabling seamless integration of diverse generative data. Inspired by DeepSeek-R1 [26], we further enrich the interleaved data with reasoning-oriented content to facilitate multi-modal reasoning, which enables seamless knowledge transfer between understanding and generation processes. As a result, the curated data captures rich world knowledge and nuanced cross-modal interaction content, equipping models with foundational capabilities in in-context prediction, world modeling, and complex multimodal reasoning.
items.zh: 为了实现这一愿景，我们建立了一个新的协议，用于可扩展的数据来源、过滤和高质量多模态交错数据的构建。除了网络来源，我们还整合了视频数据，这些数据天然提供了像素级、概念性、时间和物理连续性，为大规模获取基于世界知识提供了独有的信号。此外，我们的交错格式固有地包含了多模态对话、文本到图像/视频和图像操作等任务，实现了多样化生成数据的无缝整合。受 DeepSeek-R1 [26] 的启发，我们进一步用推理导向的内容丰富了交错数据，以促进多模态推理，从而实现理解和生成过程之间的无缝知识迁移。因此，精心策划的数据捕捉了丰富的世界知识和细微的跨模态交互内容，使模型具备了上下文预测、世界建模和复杂多模态推理的基础能力。

items.en: Regarding architecture design, our primary objective is to maximize the capacity of the model without introducing heuristic bottlenecks or task-specific constraints commonly employed in previous models. Following this design philosophy, we adopt a Mixture-of-Transformer-Experts (MoT) architecture that employs selective activation of modality-specific parameters. Unlike some prior approaches [73, 57, 69, 18] that introduce bottleneck connectors between generation and understanding modules, our design enables long-context interaction between multimodal understanding and generation through shared self-attention operations. This bottleneck-free design enables effective scaling of training data and steps, allowing the model’s full capacity signals to emerge without being hindered or obscured by architectural constraints.
items.zh: 关于架构设计，我们的主要目标是最大化模型容量，而不引入先前模型中常用的启发式瓶颈或任务特定约束。遵循这一设计理念，我们采用了混合 Transformer 专家（MoT）架构，该架构采用选择性激活模态特定参数。与一些先前方法 [73, 57, 69, 18] 在生成和理解模块之间引入瓶颈连接器不同，我们的设计通过共享的自注意力操作实现了多模态理解与生成之间的长上下文交互。这种无瓶颈设计使得训练数据和步骤的有效 Scaling 成为可能，让模型的全部容量信号得以涌现，而不受架构约束的阻碍或掩盖。

items.en: We present the Scalable Generative Cognitive Model (BAGEL), an open-source multimodal foundation model with 7B active parameters (14B total) trained on large-scale interleaved multimodal data. BAGEL outperforms the current top-tier open-source VLMs [4, 12] on standard multimodal-understanding leaderboards, and delivers text-to-image quality that is competitive with leading public generators such as SD3 [19] and FLUX.1-dev [35]. Moreover, BAGEL demonstrates consistently superior qualitative results in classical image-editing scenarios than the leading open-source models. More importantly, it extends to free-form visual manipulation, multiview synthesis, and world navigation, capabilities that constitute "world-modeling" tasks beyond the scope of previous image-editing models. We showcase the qualitative performance in Figure˜1.
items.zh: 我们提出了可扩展生成式认知模型（BAGEL），一个具有 7B 活跃参数（总计 14B）的开源多模态基础模型，在大规模交错多模态数据上训练。BAGEL 在标准多模态理解排行榜上优于当前顶级的开源 VLM [4, 12]，并提供了与领先的公开生成器（如 SD3 [19] 和 FLUX.1-dev [35]）相竞争的文生图质量。此外，BAGEL 在经典图像编辑场景中展示了持续优于领先开源模型的定性结果。更重要的是，它扩展到自由形式视觉操作、多视图合成和世界导航，这些能力构成了超出先前图像编辑模型范围的“世界建模”任务。我们在图 1 中展示了定性性能。

items.en: As BAGEL scales with interleaved multimodal pre-training, we observe a clear emerging pattern: basic multimodal understanding and high-fidelity generation converge first; next, complex editing and free-form visual manipulation abilities surface; finally, long-context reasoning starts to benefit multimodal understanding and generation, suggesting that previously independent atomic skills synergize into compositional reasoning across modalities. These emerging capabilities are not only supported by public benchmarks but are more distinctly revealed in our proposed IntelligentBench, and further verified by qualitative observations. These observations highlight that, while the optimization landscapes for understanding and generation remain partially decoupled, they can be jointly explored via shared self-attention context within a single transformer model, yielding a rich spectrum of capabilities in an open-source system.
items.zh: 随着 BAGEL 通过交错多模态预训练进行 Scaling，我们观察到一个清晰的涌现模式：首先，基本多模态理解和高保真生成收敛；其次，复杂编辑和自由形式视觉操作能力浮现；最后，长上下文推理开始有益于多模态理解和生成，表明先前独立的原子技能协同成跨模态的组合推理。这些涌现能力不仅得到公开基准测试的支持，而且在我们提出的 IntelligentBench 中更明显地揭示，并进一步通过定性观察得到验证。这些观察结果强调，虽然理解和生成的优化景观仍然部分解耦，但它们可以通过单个 Transformer 模型中的共享自注意力上下文共同探索，从而在开源系统中产生丰富的能力谱。

items.en: As illustrated in Figure˜2, BAGEL adopts a MoT architecture comprising two transformer experts—one dedicated to multimodal understanding and the other to multimodal generation. Accordingly, the model employs two separate visual encoders: an understanding-oriented encoder and a generation-oriented encoder. The two transformer experts operates on the same token sequence through the shared self-attention operation at every layer. When predicting text tokens, BAGEL follows the Next-Token-Prediction paradigm, adhering to the well-established strengths of autoregressive language models. For visual token prediction, BAGEL adopts the Rectified Flow [45, 19, 41] method following the best practice in the field of visual generation. In the remainder of this section, we share the insights and motivations that shaped these design choices.
items.zh: 如图 2 所示，BAGEL 采用 MoT 架构，包含两个 Transformer 专家——一个专用于多模态理解，另一个专用于多模态生成。相应地，该模型采用两个独立的视觉编码器：一个面向理解的编码器和一个面向生成的编码器。两个 Transformer 专家通过每层的共享自注意力操作在同一 token 序列上运行。在预测文本 token 时，BAGEL 遵循下一个词预测范式，沿用了自回归语言模型公认的优势。对于视觉 token 预测，BAGEL 采用 Rectified Flow [45, 19, 41] 方法，遵循视觉生成领域的最佳实践。在本节的其余部分，我们分享形成这些设计选择的见解和动机。

items.capEn: Figure 2: We use two Transformer experts to process understanding and generation information, and all tokens do shared multi-modal self attention in each Transformer block. We adopt two distinct encoders to separately capture semantic content and low-level pixel information for image understanding and generation tasks.
items.capZh: 图 2: 我们使用两个 Transformer 专家处理理解和生成信息，所有 token 在每个 Transformer 块中进行共享的多模态自注意力。我们采用两个不同的编码器分别捕捉图像理解和生成任务的语义内容和低级像素信息。

items.en: Typical design choices for unified multi-modal generation and understanding models include:
items.zh: 统一多模态生成和理解模型的典型设计选择包括：

items.en: Quantized AR. Autoregressive visual generation [83, 11, 79, 48, 85, 84, 70, 89, 59] with discrete visual tokenizers [51, 31, 36, 93]. This line of methods leverage the Next-Token-Prediction paradigm for both text and visual token generation, which is straightforward to implement as it can directly utilize existing LLM infrastructures. Unfortunately, the visual generation quality of autoregressive models is empirically inferior to diffusion-based models. Furthermore, inference latency suffers due to the sequential nature of the autoregressive approach.
items.zh: 量化 AR。使用离散视觉分词器 [51, 31, 36, 93] 的自回归视觉生成 [83, 11, 79, 48, 85, 84, 70, 89, 59]。这类方法利用下一个词预测范式同时生成文本和视觉 token，实现简单，可直接利用现有 LLM 基础设施。不幸的是，自回归模型的视觉生成质量在经验上不如基于扩散的模型。此外，由于自回归方法的顺序性质，推理延迟较高。

items.en: External Diffuser. LLM backbone combined with an external diffusion module [69, 23, 18, 57, 73]. This design connects pre-trained LLMs/VLMs to diffusion models via lightweight, trainable adapters. Typically, the language backbone autoregressively generates a set of latent tokens as "semantic condition" signals, which are then employed by the diffusion module to generate images. This setup often exhibits rapid convergence with minimal data consumption and may also yield competitive performance [57] on established benchmarks for multi-modal generation and understanding. Its primary drawback, however, is the compression of the LLM context into a relatively small number of latent tokens. This introduces an explicit bottleneck between understanding and generation modules, risking substantial information loss—particularly in long-context multimodal reasoning. Such a constraint might contradict the scaling philosophy of large foundational models.
items.zh: 外部扩散器。LLM 主干结合外部扩散模块 [69, 23, 18, 57, 73]。这种设计通过轻量级可训练适配器将预训练的 LLM/VLM 连接到扩散模型。通常，语言主干自回归生成一组潜在 token 作为“语义条件”信号，然后由扩散模块用于生成图像。这种设置通常以最少的数据消耗快速收敛，并可能在多模态生成和理解的既定基准测试中产生有竞争力的性能 [57]。然而，其主要缺点是将 LLM 上下文压缩为相对较少的潜在 token。这在理解和生成模块之间引入了显式瓶颈，可能导致显著的信息损失——特别是在长上下文多模态推理中。这种约束可能与大型基础模型的 Scaling 理念相矛盾。

items.en: Integrated Transformer. Unified integration of LLM and diffusion models within a single transformer [102, 50, 66, 40]. Driven by the complementary strengths of autoregressive transformers (powerful understanding/reasoning ability) and diffusion transformers (strong visual generation ability), this approach uses their common model architecture to enable seamless switching between both paradigms. Compared to the External Diffuser solution, it demands substantially higher training compute. Nonetheless, it offers a significant advantage by maintaining a bottleneck-free context throughout all transformer blocks, thereby enabling lossless interaction between the generation and understanding modules and is more amenable to scaling.
items.zh: 集成 Transformer。在单个 Transformer 中统一集成 LLM 和扩散模型 [102, 50, 66, 40]。受自回归 Transformer（强大的理解/推理能力）和扩散 Transformer（强大的视觉生成能力）互补优势的驱动，该方法利用它们共同的模型架构实现两种范式之间的无缝切换。与外部扩散器解决方案相比，它需要显著更高的训练算力。然而，它提供了一个显著优势：在所有 Transformer 块中保持无瓶颈上下文，从而实现生成和理解模块之间的无损交互，并且更易于 Scaling。

items.en: In this work, we argue that unified models have the capacity to learn richer multi-modal capabilities from large-scale interleaved multi-modal data—emergent abilities that are not captured by traditional benchmarks. To this end, we choose the bottleneck-free Integrated Transformer solution, which we believe to have greater potential in large-scale training settings and may better serve as the foundation model for long-context multimodel reasoning as well as reinforcement learning.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们认为统一模型有能力从大规模交错多模态数据中学习更丰富的多模态能力——这些涌现能力是传统基准测试无法捕捉的。为此，我们选择了无瓶颈的集成 Transformer 解决方案，我们相信它在大规模训练设置中具有更大潜力，并且可能更好地作为长上下文多模态推理以及强化学习的基础模型。

items.en: Our backbone model is inherited from an LLM with a decoder-only transformer architecture. We choose Qwen2.5 LLM [92] as the initialization for its superior performance [21] and public availability. It adopts RMSNorm [97] for normalization, SwiGLU [65] for activation, RoPE [67] for positional encoding, and GQA [2] for KV cache reduction. Moreover, we add the QK-Norm [15] in each attention block following the common practice in image/video generation models [19, 35, 63], which is effective in stabilizing the training process.
items.zh: 我们的主干模型继承自一个具有仅解码器 Transformer 架构的 LLM。我们选择 Qwen2.5 LLM [92] 作为初始化，因其优越的性能 [21] 和公开可用性。它采用 RMSNorm [97] 进行归一化，SwiGLU [65] 进行激活，RoPE [67] 进行位置编码，以及 GQA [2] 进行 KV 缓存缩减。此外，我们在每个注意力块中添加了 QK-Norm [15]，遵循图像/视频生成模型 [19, 35, 63] 的常见做法，这有助于稳定训练过程。

items.en: The visual information is represented from two aspects:
items.zh: 视觉信息从两个方面表示：

items.en: For visual understanding, we leverage a ViT encoder to convert the raw pixels into tokens. We adopt SigLIP2-so400m/14 [75] with a fixed 384384-resolution as the initialization of the ViT encoder. Building upon this, we first interpolate the position embedding and set 980×980980\times 980 as the maximum input size, and then integrate NaViT [16] to enable processing of images at their native aspect ratios. A two-layer MLP connector is adopted to match the feature dimension of the ViT tokens and the LLM hidden states.
items.zh: 对于视觉理解，我们利用 ViT 编码器将原始像素转换为 token。我们采用 SigLIP2-so400m/14 [75] 作为 ViT 编码器的初始化，固定分辨率为 384×384。在此基础上，我们首先插值位置嵌入并设置 980×980 为最大输入尺寸，然后集成 NaViT [16] 以支持以原始宽高比处理图像。采用两层 MLP 连接器来匹配 ViT token 的特征维度和 LLM 隐藏状态。

items.en: For visual generation, we use a pre-trained VAE model from FLUX [35] to convert images from pixel space to latent space and vice versa. The latent representation has a downsample ration of 8 and a latent channel of 16, and is then processed by a 2×22\times 2 patch embedding layer to reduce the spatial size and match the hidden dimension of the LLM backbone. The VAE model is frozen during training.
items.zh: 对于视觉生成，我们使用来自 FLUX [35] 的预训练 VAE 模型将图像从像素空间转换到潜在空间，反之亦然。潜在表示的下采样率为 8，潜在通道数为 16，然后通过 2×2 的 patch 嵌入层处理以减小空间尺寸并匹配 LLM 主干的隐藏维度。VAE 模型在训练期间冻结。

items.en: Our framework applies 2D positional encoding to both ViT and VAE tokens prior to their integration into the LLM backbone. For diffusion timestep encoding, we follow [17] and add a timestep embedding directly to the initial hidden states of VAE tokens, instead of using AdaLN as in conventional diffusion transformers [82, 19, 35]. This modification preserves performance while yielding a cleaner architecture. Within the LLM, the text, ViT, and VAE tokens from understanding and generation tasks are interleaved according to the modality structure of input. For tokens belonging to the same sample, we employ a generalized version of the causal attention mechanism. These tokens are first partitioned into multiple consecutive splits, each containing tokens from a single modality (e.g., either text, ViT, or VAE). Tokens in one split may attend to all tokens in preceding splits. Inside each split, we adopt causal attention on text tokens, and keep the bidirectional attention on vision tokens.
items.zh: 我们的框架在对ViT和VAE令牌集成到LLM主干之前，对两者应用二维位置编码。对于扩散时间步编码，我们遵循[17]的方法，直接将时间步嵌入添加到VAE令牌的初始隐藏状态中，而不是像传统扩散Transformer[82, 19, 35]那样使用AdaLN。这一修改在保持性能的同时，得到了更简洁的架构。在LLM内部，来自理解和生成任务的文本、ViT和VAE令牌根据输入的模态结构交错排列。对于属于同一样本的令牌，我们采用广义因果注意力机制。这些令牌首先被划分为多个连续的分段，每个分段包含来自单一模态（例如文本、ViT或VAE）的令牌。一个分段中的令牌可以关注所有前面分段中的令牌。在每个分段内部，我们对文本令牌采用因果注意力，而对视觉令牌保持双向注意力。

items.en: During training, an interleaved multimodal generation sample may contain multiple images. For each image, we prepare three sets of visual tokens:
items.zh: 在训练期间，一个交错的模态生成样本可能包含多张图像。对于每张图像，我们准备三组视觉令牌：

items.en: Noised VAE tokens: VAE latents corrupted with diffusion noise, used exclusively for Rectified-Flow training; the MSE loss is computed on this set.
items.zh: 带噪声的VAE令牌：用扩散噪声破坏的VAE潜变量，专门用于Rectified-Flow训练；MSE损失在此组上计算。

items.en: Clean VAE tokens: the original (noise-free) latents, which serve as conditioning when generating subsequent image or text tokens.
items.zh: 干净的VAE令牌：原始（无噪声）潜变量，在生成后续图像或文本令牌时作为条件。

items.en: ViT tokens: obtained from the SigLIP2 encoder, which help to unify the input format across interleaved generation and understanding data and, empirically, to boost interleaved-generation quality.
items.zh: ViT令牌：从SigLIP2编码器获得，有助于统一交错生成和理解数据的输入格式，并且经验上能提升交错生成质量。

items.en: For interleaved image or text generation, subsequent image or text tokens may attend to the clean VAE tokens and ViT tokens of preceding images, but not to their noised VAE counterparts.
items.zh: 对于交错的图像或文本生成，后续的图像或文本令牌可以关注前面图像的干净VAE令牌和ViT令牌，但不能关注其带噪声的VAE令牌。

items.en: For interleaved multi-image generation, we adopt the diffusion forcing strategy [8], which adds independent noise levels to different images and conditions each image on noisy representations of preceding images. Additionally, to enhance generation consistency, we randomly group consecutive images following [17] and apply full attention within each group. The noise level is the same inside each group.
items.zh: 对于交错的多图像生成，我们采用扩散强制策略[8]，该策略为不同图像添加独立的噪声水平，并让每张图像以前面图像的噪声表示作为条件。此外，为了增强生成一致性，我们按照[17]的方法随机将连续图像分组，并在每组内应用完全注意力。每组内的噪声水平相同。

items.en: We implement the generalized causal attention with PyTorch FlexAttention [72], achieving a ∼2×\sim\!\!2\times speed-up over naive scaled-dot-product attention. During inference, the generalized causal structure allows us to cache key-value (KV) pairs of the generated multimodal context and thus accelerate multimodal decoding. Only the KV pairs of clean VAE tokens and ViT tokens are stored; once an image is fully generated, the corresponding noised VAE tokens in the context are replaced by their clean counterparts. To enable classifier-free guidance [29] in interleaved inference, we randomly drop text, ViT, and clean VAE tokens with probabilities 0.1, 0.5, and 0.1, respectively. An illustration of the generalized casual attention is shown in Figure˜15.
items.zh: 我们使用PyTorch FlexAttention[72]实现广义因果注意力，相比朴素的缩放点积注意力实现了约2倍加速。在推理时，广义因果结构允许我们缓存生成的多模态上下文的键值对，从而加速多模态解码。仅存储干净VAE令牌和ViT令牌的键值对；一旦图像完全生成，上下文中对应的带噪声VAE令牌将被其干净版本替换。为了在交错推理中实现无分类器引导[29]，我们分别以0.1、0.5和0.1的概率随机丢弃文本、ViT和干净VAE令牌。广义因果注意力的示意图见图15。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Loss curves of various designs. CE loss and MSE loss are computed on multimodal understanding and generation tasks, respectively. Ablation experiments are carried out on a 1.5B LLM. The sampling ratio for generation and understanding data is set at 4:1.
items.capZh: 图3：各种设计的损失曲线。CE损失和MSE损失分别在多模态理解和生成任务上计算。消融实验在1.5B LLM上进行。生成数据与理解数据的采样比例设为4:1。

items.en: Following the principle of the Integrated Transformer solution, we compare several transformer variants: the standard Dense Transformer, a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) transformer, and a Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture.
items.zh: 遵循集成Transformer方案的原则，我们比较了几种Transformer变体：标准密集Transformer、混合专家（MoE）Transformer和混合Transformer（MoT）架构。

items.en: MoE variant: we duplicate only the feed-forward network (FFN) in each Qwen2.5 LLM block as the initialization of the generation expert.
items.zh: MoE变体：我们仅复制每个Qwen2.5 LLM块中的前馈网络作为生成专家的初始化。

items.en: MoT variant: we duplicate all trainable parameters of Qwen2.5 LLM to create a full-size generation expert. This type of architecture has been adopted by existing works [66, 40].
items.zh: MoT变体：我们复制Qwen2.5 LLM的所有可训练参数，创建一个完整大小的生成专家。这种架构已被现有工作[66, 40]采用。

items.en: Both MoE and MoT in our model use hard routing: the newly replicated generation expert exclusively processes VAE tokens, while the original parameters—the understanding expert—handle text and ViT tokens, following the strategy of the Qwen-VL series [77, 4]. Although the MoE and MoT architectures increase the total parameter count by approximately twofold compared to the dense baseline, all three model variants have identical FLOPs during both training and inference.
items.zh: 我们模型中的MoE和MoT都使用硬路由：新复制的生成专家专门处理VAE令牌，而原始参数——理解专家——处理文本和ViT令牌，遵循Qwen-VL系列[77, 4]的策略。尽管与密集基线相比，MoE和MoT架构的总参数量增加了大约两倍，但所有三种模型变体在训练和推理期间的FLOPs相同。

items.en: We conduct a controlled experiment on 1.5B Qwen-2.5 LLM, maintaining identical hyper-parameters and data configurations to isolate the transformer architecture as the sole variable. As illustrated in Figure˜3, the MoT variant consistently outperforms both the dense and MoE designs, with the gap being most pronounced on the multimodal generation task. The MSE loss (generation) exhibits a smooth, monotonically decreasing trajectory, where MoT not only converges fastest but also attains the lowest final loss. In contrast, the CE loss (understanding) exhibits greater step-to-step fluctuations—an expected consequence of interleaving heterogeneous data—yet MoT still maintains the best performance in general. These findings highlight the clear advantage of decoupling the parameters devoted to generation from those optimized for understanding, which suggests the two objectives may steer the model toward distinct regions of the parameter space—at least at the 1.5B scale examined here. In short, allocating separate capacity for multimodal understanding and generation can mitigate optimization challenges arising from competing modality-specific learning objectives.
items.zh: 我们在1.5B Qwen-2.5 LLM上进行了控制实验，保持相同的超参数和数据配置，仅将Transformer架构作为唯一变量。如图3所示，MoT变体在密集和MoE设计上均表现更优，差距在多模态生成任务上最为显著。MSE损失（生成）呈现平滑、单调递减的轨迹，MoT不仅收敛最快，而且最终损失最低。相比之下，CE损失（理解）表现出更大的逐步波动——这是交错异构数据的预期结果——但MoT总体上仍保持最佳性能。这些发现突显了将生成参数与理解参数解耦的明显优势，表明这两个目标可能将模型引导至参数空间的不同区域——至少在本文考察的1.5B规模下如此。简而言之，为多模态理解和生成分配独立的容量可以缓解因竞争性模态特定学习目标而产生的优化挑战。

items.en: As data define the knowledge boundaries of large foundational models, BAGEL is trained on a diverse set of datasets spanning multiple modalities—including language, image, video, and web data—enabling it to perform multimodal reasoning, in-context prediction, physical dynamics modeling, and future frame prediction, all through a unified multimodal interface. In addition to standard vision-language (VLM), text-to-image (T2I), and large-scale language modeling (LLM) datasets, we build new vision-text interleaved datasets from web and video sources to further enhance the model’s ability for sequential multimodal reasoning. In Table˜1, we summarize the scale and composition of our training data across different modalities. In the following sections, we detail our dataset sources, preparation protocols, and data mixing strategies.
items.zh: 由于数据定义了大型基础模型的知识边界，BAGEL在涵盖多种模态（包括语言、图像、视频和网络数据）的多样化数据集上进行训练，使其能够通过统一的多模态接口执行多模态推理、上下文预测、物理动力学建模和未来帧预测。除了标准的视觉语言（VLM）、文本到图像（T2I）和大规模语言建模（LLM）数据集外，我们还从网络和视频源构建了新的视觉文本交错数据集，以进一步增强模型在顺序多模态推理方面的能力。在表1中，我们总结了不同模态训练数据的规模和组成。在以下部分，我们详细介绍了数据集来源、准备协议和数据混合策略。

items.en: To maintain the language modeling capabilities of the underlying LLM, we supplement our training corpus with a collection of high-quality text-only data. The data are curated to support broad linguistic coverage and enable strong reasoning and generation abilities across general-purpose text tasks.
items.zh: 为了保持底层LLM的语言建模能力，我们用一组高质量纯文本数据补充训练语料。这些数据经过精心策划，以支持广泛的语言覆盖，并在通用文本任务中实现强大的推理和生成能力。

items.en: Text-image paired data plays a central role in multimodal learning, providing large-scale visual supervision for both vision-language models (VLMs) [37, 77] and text-to-image (T2I) generation [35, 62, 58, 5]. In our setup, we organize vision-text paired data into two subsets based on their downstream usage: one for VLM pre-training and one for T2I generation.
items.zh: 文本-图像配对数据在多模态学习中扮演核心角色，为视觉语言模型（VLM）[37, 77]和文本到图像（T2I）生成[35, 62, 58, 5]提供大规模视觉监督。在我们的设置中，我们根据下游用途将视觉文本配对数据组织成两个子集：一个用于VLM预训练，一个用于T2I生成。

items.en: VLM Image-Text Pairs. We utilize large-scale image-text pairs for VLM training, covering a broad range of visual concepts and primarily sourced from web alt-text and captions. The data have undergone CLIP-based similarity filtering, resolution and aspect ratio constraints, text length checks, and deduplication to ensure quality and diversity. To address long-tail distributions, concept-aware sampling is applied to improve coverage of rare categories. In addition, structured supervision from OCR documents, charts, and grounding annotations is included to enhance the model’s capabilities in reading and spatial understanding.
items.zh: VLM图像-文本对。我们利用大规模图像-文本对进行VLM训练，涵盖广泛的视觉概念，主要来源于网络alt文本和标题。这些数据经过基于CLIP的相似性过滤、分辨率和宽高比约束、文本长度检查和去重，以确保质量和多样性。为了解决长尾分布问题，应用了概念感知采样以提高稀有类别的覆盖率。此外，还包括来自OCR文档、图表和接地标注的结构化监督，以增强模型的阅读和空间理解能力。

items.en: T2I Image-Text Pairs. We incorporate high-quality image-text pairs, as well as minimal synthetic data from existing T2I models [35, 19]. These data feature not only diverse caption styles such as artistic, textual, and surreal captions, but also high-quality images that are filtered for clarity, structural integrity, and semantic diversity. Together, these examples enhance the visual quality and stylistic variety of our T2I training corpus.
items.zh: T2I图像-文本对。我们整合了高质量的图像-文本对，以及来自现有T2I模型[35, 19]的最小合成数据。这些数据不仅具有多样化的标题风格，如艺术、文本和超现实标题，而且图像质量高，经过清晰度、结构完整性和语义多样性过滤。这些示例共同提升了我们T2I训练语料的视觉质量和风格多样性。

items.en: While vision-text paired data provides useful supervision, it falls short in supporting complex in-context reasoning involving multiple images and intermediate text. Models trained on such data often struggle to capture visual and semantic relationships across modalities, resulting in less coherent generations. To address these limitations, we incorporate large-scale vision-text interleaved data into training. For improving multimodal understanding, we utilize VLM interleaved datasets. For visual generation, we introduce a unified protocol for constructing vision-text interleaved data by combining diverse sources to support richer multimodal interactions, as detailed below.
items.zh: 虽然视觉文本配对数据提供了有用的监督，但在支持涉及多张图像和中间文本的复杂上下文推理方面存在不足。仅在此类数据上训练的模型往往难以捕捉跨模态的视觉和语义关系，导致生成结果不够连贯。为了解决这些限制，我们将大规模视觉文本交错数据纳入训练。为了改进多模态理解，我们利用VLM交错数据集。对于视觉生成，我们引入了一个统一的协议，通过结合多种来源构建视觉文本交错数据，以支持更丰富的多模态交互，具体如下所述。

items.en: To comprehensively cover diverse real-world scenarios with scalable data supply, our training corpus integrates two primary sources that provide sufficient knowledge for multimodal reasoning: video data and web data.
items.zh: 为全面覆盖多样化的真实场景并提供可扩展的数据供给，我们的训练语料整合了两个主要来源，为多模态推理提供充足知识：视频数据和网页数据。

items.en: Video data offers rich world knowledge by capturing temporal and spatial dynamics directly from the real world—the largest and most natural simulator. It preserves fine-grained visual details, maintains identity consistency across frames, and models complex motion, making it particularly effective for tasks such as image editing, navigation, and 3D manipulation. We construct our video dataset using publicly available online video resources, as well as two open-source datasets: Koala36M [78], which provides large-scale instructional and interaction-rich content, and MVImgNet2.0 [28], which contains objects captured from varying camera viewpoints to support multi-view spatial understanding.
items.zh: 视频数据通过直接从真实世界（最大且最自然的模拟器）捕获时间与空间动态，提供了丰富的世界知识。它保留了精细的视觉细节，保持帧间身份一致性，并对复杂运动进行建模，使其在图像编辑、导航和3D操作等任务中尤为有效。我们利用公开可用的在线视频资源以及两个开源数据集构建视频数据集：Koala36M [78]（提供大规模教学和交互丰富的内容）和MVImgNet2.0 [28]（包含从不同相机视角捕获的对象，以支持多视角空间理解）。

items.en: Web data captures complex real-world multimodal structures and offers diverse knowledge spanning a wide range of domains. It includes naturally interleaved resources such as illustrated encyclopedic articles, step-by-step visual tutorials, and other richly grounded documents. This interleaved format offers rich supervision for training models to perform multimodal reasoning. We build upon OmniCorpus [39], a large-scale dataset preprocessed from Common Crawl [14], which provides a vast collection of web documents with interleaved text and images. We additionally include open-source image editing datasets as structured interleaved data [80, 100, 22, 32, 87, 3], which teach fine-grained editing behaviors and enhance the model’s ability for precise multimodal reasoning and step-by-step generation.
items.zh: 网页数据捕获了复杂的真实世界多模态结构，并提供了涵盖广泛领域的多样化知识。它包括自然交错排列的资源，如带插图的百科全书文章、分步视觉教程和其他丰富上下文的文档。这种交错格式为训练模型执行多模态推理提供了丰富的监督信号。我们基于OmniCorpus [39]构建，这是一个从Common Crawl [14]预处理的大规模数据集，提供了大量文本与图像交错的网页文档。我们还额外加入了开源图像编辑数据集作为结构化交错数据 [80, 100, 22, 32, 87, 3]，这些数据教授精细的编辑行为，并增强模型进行精确多模态推理和逐步生成的能力。

items.en: Data Filtering for Video Data. We follow T2V video processing pipelines [63] protocol to preprocess videos into high-quality training clips through temporal splitting, spatial cropping, and quality filtering. Videos are first segmented into short, coherent clips using lightweight shot detection, with related segments optionally merged based on visual similarity. We then remove black borders and overlays such as logos or text using crop detection and frame-level bounding box aggregation. To ensure quality, we filter clips by length, resolution, clarity, and motion stability, and deduplicate using CLIP-based similarity. This process yields a clean and diverse video dataset suitable for multimodal training.
items.zh: 视频数据过滤。我们遵循T2V视频处理流程 [63] 协议，通过时间分割、空间裁剪和质量过滤将视频预处理为高质量的训练片段。首先使用轻量级的镜头检测将视频分割为短而连贯的片段，并根据视觉相似性可选地合并相关片段。然后，我们通过裁剪检测和帧级边界框聚合去除黑边以及徽标或文字等覆盖物。为确保质量，我们根据长度、分辨率、清晰度和运动稳定性过滤片段，并使用基于CLIP的相似性进行去重。这一过程产生了干净且多样化的视频数据集，适用于多模态训练。

items.en: Data Filtering for Web Data. To curate high-quality interleaved data from a large corpus, we design a two-stage filtering pipeline targeting documents such as tutorials, encyclopedic entries, and design content, where text and images exhibit strong semantic alignment. Inspired by DeepSeekMath [64], we first apply a lightweight topic selection process: LLMs are prompted to classify a small subset of documents, and the resulting labels are used to train fastText [34] classifiers for efficient large-scale inference. The selected data are then passed through the LLM classifier again for fine-grained filtering. We adopt the 14B variant of Qwen2.5 models [92] for its balance of performance and efficiency. To further improve data quality, we apply a set of rule-based filters targeting image clarity, relevance, and document structure, as summarized in Table˜2.
items.zh: 网页数据过滤。为从大规模语料中筛选高质量的交错数据，我们设计了一个两阶段过滤流程，针对教程、百科全书条目和设计内容等文档，其中文本和图像表现出强烈的语义对齐。受DeepSeekMath [64]启发，我们首先应用轻量级的主题选择过程：提示LLM对一小部分文档进行分类，所得标签用于训练fastText [34]分类器，以实现高效的大规模推理。然后，选中的数据再次通过LLM分类器进行细粒度过滤。我们采用Qwen2.5模型的14B变体 [92]，以平衡性能和效率。为进一步提高数据质量，我们应用一组基于规则的过滤器，针对图像清晰度、相关性和文档结构，如表2所示。

items.capEn: (a) Data pipeline for interleaved data from videos.
items.capZh: (a) 来自视频的交错数据流水线。

items.capEn: (b) Data pipeline for interleaved data from webs.
items.capZh: (b) 来自网页的交错数据流水线。

items.en: Interleaved Data from Videos. To construct image-text interleaved sequences from video, we generate textual descriptions of visual changes between consecutive frames—capturing object motion, action transitions, and scene shifts. These inter-frame captions serve as temporal supervision for learning visual dynamics. While large VLMs can produce high-quality change descriptions, their inference cost limits scalability. We instead distill a lightweight captioning model based on Qwen2.5-VL-7B [4], finetuned on a small set of high-quality inter-frame examples. To reduce hallucination, we cap the caption length at 30 tokens. For each video clip, we sample an average of four frames and generate captions for each frame pair, resulting in 45 million temporally grounded interleaved sequences. Figure˜4(a) illustrates the data pipeline along with an example.
items.zh: 来自视频的交错数据。为从视频构建图像-文本交错序列，我们生成连续帧之间视觉变化的文本描述——捕捉物体运动、动作转换和场景变化。这些帧间描述作为学习视觉动态的时间监督信号。虽然大型VLM可以生成高质量的变化描述，但其推理成本限制了可扩展性。我们转而蒸馏一个基于Qwen2.5-VL-7B [4]的轻量级描述模型，该模型在一小组高质量帧间示例上微调。为减少幻觉，我们将描述长度限制为30个token。对于每个视频片段，我们平均采样四帧并为每对帧生成描述，最终得到4500万个时间上连贯的交错序列。图4(a)展示了数据流水线及一个示例。

items.en: Interleaved Data from Webs. To construct high-quality interleaved sequences from web documents, we aim to reduce the difficulty of image generation caused by weak alignment between images, their accompanying text, and surrounding visual context. To provide more localized and relevant cues for each image, we adopt a caption-first strategy: for each image, we generate a concise description using Qwen2.5-VL-7B [4] and insert it directly before the image as a conceptual scaffold. This enables the model to form a conceptual draft of the target image-grounded in both preceding context and the inserted caption—before generating it. By generating the caption to guide what the model should expect in the image, this approach mitigates issues caused by loosely related or ambiguous inputs. Additionally, we rewrite inter-image text segments exceeding 300 tokens using an LLM summarizer to improve contextual density. These steps yield a cleaner and more structured dataset of 20 million interleaved web documents. Data pipeline and examples is shown in Figure˜4(b).
items.zh: 来自网页的交错数据。为从网页文档构建高质量的交错序列，我们旨在降低因图像与其伴随文本及周围视觉上下文之间弱对齐而导致的图像生成难度。为每张图像提供更局部化和相关的线索，我们采用描述优先策略：使用Qwen2.5-VL-7B [4]为每张图像生成简洁描述，并将其直接插入图像之前作为概念支架。这使得模型在生成图像之前，能够基于前文和插入的描述形成目标图像的概念草稿。通过生成描述来引导模型预期图像内容，该方法缓解了由松散相关或模糊输入引起的问题。此外，我们使用LLM摘要器重写超过300个token的图像间文本段，以提高上下文密度。这些步骤产生了更干净、更结构化的2000万个交错网页文档数据集。数据流水线和示例如图4(b)所示。

items.en: Inspired by recent models like O1 [33] and DeepSeek-R1 [26], we leverage long-context Chain-of-Thoughts data for multimodal understanding. Moreover, we hypothesize that introducing a language-based reasoning step before image generation helps clarify visual goals and improve planning. To explore this, we construct 500k reasoning-augmented examples, covering four categories based on the structural relation between input and output: text-to-image generation, free-form image manipulation, and abstract edits.
items.zh: 受近期模型如O1 [33]和DeepSeek-R1 [26]的启发，我们利用长上下文思维链数据进行多模态理解。此外，我们假设在图像生成之前引入基于语言的推理步骤有助于明确视觉目标并改进规划。为探索这一点，我们构建了50万个推理增强示例，涵盖基于输入与输出结构关系的四个类别：文本到图像生成、自由形式图像操作和抽象编辑。

items.en: Text-to-Image generation. We begin by manually crafting a set of brief and ambiguous T2I queries, each paired with simple generation guidance. Using in-context learning, we prompt Qwen2.5-72B [92] to generate additional query-guidance pairs and corresponding detailed prompts, which are then passed to FLUX.1-dev [35] to produce target images. This process yields training triplets of query, reasoning trace (guidance ++ detailed prompt), and image, enabling models to ground image generation in language-based reasoning.
items.zh: 文本到图像生成。我们首先手动构建一组简短且模糊的T2I查询，每个查询配以简单的生成指导。利用上下文学习，我们提示Qwen2.5-72B [92]生成额外的查询-指导对和相应的详细提示，然后将其传递给FLUX.1-dev [35]以生成目标图像。这一过程产生了查询、推理轨迹（指导 + 详细提示）和图像的三元组训练数据，使模型能够将图像生成基于语言推理。

items.en: Free-form image manipulation. We generate reasoning-augmented examples by prompting a VLM with the source image, target image, user query, and a reasoning trace example from DeepSeek-R1 [26]. The R1 example is generated by conditioning on the source and target captions, user query, and a reasoning instruction. The VLM prompt for the reasoning trace generation is demonstrated in Table˜9 and Table˜10. We sample source and target image pairs primarily from two sources: open-source editing datasets such as OmniEdit [80], and interleaved video data, which provide a rich set of naturally occurring edit scenarios characterized by substantial motion, viewpoint variations, and human interactions while preserving spatial-temporal coherence.
items.zh: 自由形式图像操作。我们通过提示VLM生成推理增强示例，输入包括源图像、目标图像、用户查询以及来自DeepSeek-R1 [26]的推理轨迹示例。R1示例通过基于源和目标描述、用户查询及推理指令生成。用于推理轨迹生成的VLM提示如表9和表10所示。我们主要从两个来源采样源图像和目标图像对：开源编辑数据集如OmniEdit [80]，以及交错视频数据，后者提供了丰富的自然编辑场景，具有显著的运动、视角变化和人类交互，同时保持时空一致性。

items.en: Conceptual Edits. Conceptual edits target cases where image manipulation requires high-level conceptual reasoning rather than simple local pixel modifications, such as transforming an object into a design sketch. For these tasks, we use the web interleaved dataset, sampling candidate image pairs from each sequence and applying a three-stage VLM pipeline to construct high-quality QA examples. First, given a sequence of images, we prompt the VLM to identify a plausible input-output pair. Next, we prompt the model to generate a corresponding textual question based on the selected pair. Finally, we use the VLM to assess the quality of the question and its alignment with the input and output images, filtering out low-quality examples. Accepted examples are then passed to the VLM, prompted with a reasoning trace example from DeepSeek-R1 [26], to produce grounded explanations of the intended transformation, as shown in Table˜11. This setup helps the model learn to interpret complex visual goals from diverse textual instructions.
items.zh: 概念编辑。概念编辑针对需要高级概念推理而非简单局部像素修改的图像操作场景，例如将对象转换为设计草图。对于这些任务，我们使用网页交错数据集，从每个序列中采样候选图像对，并应用三阶段VLM流水线构建高质量的问答示例。首先，给定一系列图像，我们提示VLM识别一个合理的输入-输出对。接着，提示模型基于所选对生成相应的文本问题。最后，使用VLM评估问题的质量及其与输入和输出图像的对齐程度，过滤掉低质量示例。接受的示例随后传递给VLM，并提示使用DeepSeek-R1 [26]的推理轨迹示例，以生成预期变换的合理解释，如表11所示。这一设置帮助模型学习从多样的文本指令中解释复杂的视觉目标。

items.en: As shown in Table˜3, we adopt a multi-stage training strategy using a dynamic mixture of the curated data described above—specifically, an Alignment stage for initializing the VLM connector, a Pre-training stage for large-scale pre-training, a Continued Training stage for increased resolution and interleaved data ratio, and a Supervised Fine-tuning stage for high-quality fine-tuning:
items.zh: 如表3所示，我们采用多阶段训练策略，动态混合上述策划的数据——具体包括：对齐阶段用于初始化VLM连接器，预训练阶段用于大规模预训练，持续训练阶段用于提高分辨率和交错数据比例，以及监督微调阶段用于高质量微调：

items.en: Stage: Alignment. In this stage, we align the SigLIP2 ViT encoder with the Qwen2.5 LLM by training only the MLP connector while keeping the vision encoder and the language model frozen. Only image–text pair data are used during this stage to perform image captioning, where each image is resized to a fixed resolution of 378×378378\times 378 to match the input size of the pre-trained SigLIP2.
items.zh: 阶段：对齐。在此阶段，我们通过仅训练MLP连接器，同时冻结视觉编码器和语言模型，将SigLIP2 ViT编码器与Qwen2.5 LLM对齐。此阶段仅使用图像-文本对数据进行图像描述，每张图像被调整为固定分辨率378×378，以匹配预训练SigLIP2的输入尺寸。

items.en: Stage: Pre-training (PT). During this stage, we add QK-Norm to the LLM and all model parameters except those of the VAE are trainable. The training corpus comprises 2.5T tokens, consisting of text, image–text pairs, multimodal conversation, web-interleaved, and video-interleaved data. We adopt a native-resolution strategy for both multimodal understanding and generation, with restrictions on the maximum long side and minimum short side of each image.
items.zh: 阶段：预训练（PT）。在此阶段，我们向LLM添加QK-Norm，并且除VAE外的所有模型参数均可训练。训练语料包含2.5T token，由文本、图像-文本对、多模态对话、网页交错和视频交错数据组成。我们对多模态理解和生成均采用原生分辨率策略，并对每张图像的最大长边和最小短边施加限制。

items.en: Stage: Continued Training (CT). Compared with PT, we increase the visual input resolution in the CT stage, which is important for both multimodal generation and understanding performance. We further strategically increase the sampling ratio of interleaved data to emphasize learning cross-modal reasoning, as the model’s core understanding and generation capabilities become more stable and reliable. The CT stage consumes approximately 2.6T tokens.
items.zh: 阶段：持续训练（CT）。与PT相比，我们在CT阶段增加了视觉输入分辨率，这对多模态生成和理解性能都很重要。我们进一步策略性地提高交错数据的采样比例，以强调跨模态推理的学习，因为模型的核心理解和生成能力变得更加稳定可靠。CT阶段消耗约2.6T token。

items.en: Stage: Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT). In the SFT stage, for multimodal generation we construct a high-quality subset from the image–text-pair dataset and the interleaved-generation dataset. For multimodal understanding, we filter a subset from the LLaVA-OV [37] and Mammoth-VL [27] instruction-tuning data. The total number of training tokens at this stage is 72.7billion.
items.zh: 阶段：监督微调（SFT）。在SFT阶段，对于多模态生成，我们从图像-文本对数据集和交错生成数据集中构建高质量子集。对于多模态理解，我们从LLaVA-OV [37]和Mammoth-VL [27]的指令微调数据中过滤子集。此阶段的训练token总数约为727亿。

items.en: For all training stages, we use the AdamW [47] optimizer with β1=0.9\beta_{1}=0.9, β2=0.95\beta_{2}=0.95. Inspired by [52], we set ϵ=1.0×10−15\epsilon=1.0\times 10^{-15} to suppress loss spikes. When increasing the resolution for generation, we also increase the diffusion timestep from 1.0 to 4.0 to ensure a proper noise-level distribution. We adopt a constant learning rate for the PT, CT, and SFT stages so that we can easily scale the training data without restarting the training process [30]. To ensure load balance among different ranks, we pack the sequences on each rank into a narrow length range (32K to 36K tokens for Alignment and PT, 40K to 45K tokens for CT and SFT).
items.zh: 对于所有训练阶段，我们使用AdamW [47]优化器，β1=0.9，β2=0.95。受[52]启发，我们设置ϵ=1.0×10^{-15}以抑制损失尖峰。当提高生成分辨率时，我们还将扩散时间步从1.0增加到4.0，以确保适当的噪声水平分布。我们对PT、CT和SFT阶段采用恒定学习率，以便轻松扩展训练数据而无需重启训练过程 [30]。为确保不同rank之间的负载均衡，我们将每个rank上的序列打包到较窄的长度范围内（对齐和PT阶段为32K到36K token，CT和SFT阶段为40K到45K token）。

items.en: Unlike the pre-training of standalone VLMs or T2I models, unified multimodal pre-training requires careful tuning of two key hyper-parameters—the data-sampling ratio and the learning rate—to balance signals from understanding and generation tasks. Below, we describe the empirical insights that guided these choices, which in turn shaped the training protocol summarized in Table˜3.
items.zh: 与独立的VLM或T2I模型的预训练不同，统一的多模态预训练需要仔细调整两个关键超参数——数据采样比率和学习率——以平衡来自理解和生成任务的信号。下面，我们描述指导这些选择的经验见解，这些见解进而形成了表3中总结的训练协议。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Loss curves of different data ratios. Ablation experiments are carried out on a 1.5B LLM. "1g1u" means that the sampling ratio for generation and understanding data is set at 1:1.
items.capZh: 图5：不同数据比例的损失曲线。在1.5B大语言模型上进行消融实验。“1g1u”表示生成数据与理解数据的采样比例为1:1。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Loss curves of different learning rates. Ablation experiments are carried out on a 1.5B LLM. The sampling ratio for generation and understanding data is set at 1:1.
items.capZh: 图6：不同学习率的损失曲线。在1.5B大语言模型上进行消融实验。生成数据与理解数据的采样比例设置为1:1。

items.en: To choose the sampling ratios for each data source during unified pre-training, we conducted a series of controlled studies on the 1.5B Qwen2.5 LLM [92] by adjusting the proportion of multimodal generation data versus multimodal understanding data. As shown in Figure˜5, increasing the sampling ration of generation data from 50% ("1g1u") to 80% ("4g1u") steadily reduces the MSE loss, results in a 0.4% absolute reduction—a considerable margin for rectified-flow models in practice. In contrast, the cross-entropy (CE) loss exhibits no consistent pattern across sampling ratios; the largest observed gap, 0.07 at step 14,000 between "4g1u" and "2g1u", has negligible impact on downstream benchmarks. These findings suggest that generation examples should be sampled substantially more often than understanding examples—a heuristic we adopt throughout the training protocol summarized in Table˜3.
items.zh: 为了在统一预训练过程中选择每种数据源的采样比例，我们在1.5B Qwen2.5大语言模型[92]上通过调整多模态生成数据与多模态理解数据的比例进行了一系列控制研究。如图5所示，将生成数据的采样比例从50%（“1g1u”）增加到80%（“4g1u”）会稳步降低MSE损失，绝对降低0.4%——这对于实际中的整流流模型来说是一个相当大的幅度。相比之下，交叉熵（CE）损失在不同采样比例下没有表现出一致的模式；在步骤14,000处，“4g1u”与“2g1u”之间的最大差距为0.07，对下游基准测试的影响可以忽略不计。这些发现表明，生成样本的采样频率应远高于理解样本——我们在表3总结的训练协议中采用了这一启发式方法。

items.en: We next carried out a controlled experiment identical to the setup in Section˜4.1 except for the learning-rate setup. As shown in Figure˜6, the two losses behave oppositely: a larger learning rate makes the MSE loss converge faster, whereas a smaller learning rate benefits the CE loss. To reconcile this trade-off, we assign separate weighting factors to the two objectives, as listed in Table˜3.
items.zh: 接下来，我们进行了一项控制实验，设置与第4.1节相同，只是学习率设置不同。如图6所示，两种损失表现相反：较大的学习率使MSE损失收敛更快，而较小的学习率有利于CE损失。为了协调这种权衡，我们为两个目标分配了单独的权重因子，如表3所列。

items.en: To comprehensively evaluate a unified model, we draw on established benchmarks that target well-defined skills such as multimodal understanding, T2I generation, and classical image editing. Yet for capabilities that demand strong multimodal reasoning and complex task composition, effective evaluation strategies are still lacking. In the following, we first illustrate the available benchmarks used during our evaluation process, and then introduce a new evaluation suite for free-form image manipulation (including conceptual editing), designed to reveal a model’s proficiency in multimodal reasoning and complex compositional tasks.
items.zh: 为了全面评估统一模型，我们采用了针对明确定义技能（如多模态理解、T2I生成和经典图像编辑）的现有基准测试。然而，对于需要强多模态推理和复杂任务组合的能力，有效的评估策略仍然缺乏。在下文中，我们首先说明评估过程中使用的可用基准测试，然后介绍一个新的自由形式图像操作（包括概念编辑）评估套件，旨在揭示模型在多模态推理和复杂组合任务方面的熟练程度。

items.en: Multimodal understanding. We adopt six widely used benchmarks—MME [20], MMBench (1.01.0-EN) [46], MM-Vet [95], MMMU [96], MathVista [49], and MMVP [74]. Collectively they offer a concise but comprehensive testbed that spans perception, cognition, and multimodal reasoning, while retaining strong discriminative power for ranking state-of-the-art models.
items.zh: 多模态理解。我们采用了六个广泛使用的基准测试——MME [20]、MMBench (1.01.0-EN) [46]、MM-Vet [95]、MMMU [96]、MathVista [49]和MMVP [74]。它们共同提供了一个简洁而全面的测试平台，涵盖感知、认知和多模态推理，同时保持对最先进模型排名的强大区分能力。

items.en: Text-to-Image generation. We follow [11, 57] and report results on the popular GenEval [25] benchmark. We also adopt the recently proposed WISE benchmark [53], which offers a comprehensive assessment of complex semantic understanding and world-knowledge integration in text-to-image generation. In addition, we include qualitative comparisons with state-of-the-art models as a complement to these automatic evaluation metrics.
items.zh: 文本到图像生成。我们遵循[11, 57]并在流行的GenEval [25]基准测试上报告结果。我们还采用了最近提出的WISE基准测试[53]，该测试提供了对文本到图像生成中复杂语义理解和世界知识整合的全面评估。此外，我们还包括与最先进模型的定性比较，作为这些自动评估指标的补充。

items.en: Image Editing. We adopt GEdit-Bench [44] as our primary evaluation suite owing to its real-world relevance and diverse set of editing tasks. Built from authentic user requests scraped from the web, GEdit-Bench closely mirrors practical editing needs. Performance is scored automatically with GPT-4.1 [54], and we also supplement these scores with qualitative examples to provide a more nuanced assessment.
items.zh: 图像编辑。我们采用GEdit-Bench [44]作为主要评估套件，因为它具有现实世界的相关性和多样化的编辑任务。GEdit-Bench基于从网络抓取的真实用户请求构建，紧密反映了实际的编辑需求。性能使用GPT-4.1 [54]自动评分，我们还用定性示例补充这些分数，以提供更细致的评估。

items.en: Intelligent Image Editing. We propose IntelligentBench as a proxy task for the evaluation of free-form image manipulation ability, which requires complex multimodal reasoning and task composition. The initial release of IntelligentBench comprises 350 examples, each consisting of a question image, question text, and a reference answer image. Evaluation is performed using GPT-4o (version: gpt-4o-2024-11-20), which reviews a complete quadruplet—the question image, question text, reference answer image, and the model-generated image. The evaluation criteria include request fulfillment, visual consistency, and knowledge-grounded creativity, reflecting the benchmark’s focus on both task correctness and the depth of reasoning. Each answer is scored on a scale from 0 to 2. The final score of a model is calculated by summing all individual scores and normalizing the total to a 100-point scale. The detailed evaluation prompt is provided in Appendix Table˜12. With the help of IntelligentBench, we can evaluate how well the model performs reasoning and integrates world knowledge for image editing. Some showcases and qualitative results on IntelligentBench can be found in Figure˜12.
items.zh: 智能图像编辑。我们提出IntelligentBench作为评估自由形式图像操作能力的代理任务，这需要复杂的多模态推理和任务组合。IntelligentBench的初始版本包含350个示例，每个示例由一个问题图像、问题文本和一个参考答案图像组成。评估使用GPT-4o（版本：gpt-4o-2024-11-20）进行，它审查完整的四元组——问题图像、问题文本、参考答案图像和模型生成的图像。评估标准包括请求满足度、视觉一致性和基于知识的创造力，反映了基准测试对任务正确性和推理深度的关注。每个答案按0到2的等级评分。模型的最终分数通过将所有单个分数相加并将总分归一化到100分制来计算。详细的评估提示见附录表12。借助IntelligentBench，我们可以评估模型在图像编辑中进行推理和整合世界知识的能力。一些展示和定性结果可在图12中找到。

items.capEn: (a) Average score on Image Understanding tasks.
items.capZh: (a) 图像理解任务的平均得分。

items.capEn: (b) GenEval score on Image Generation task.
(c) GEdit Overall Score on classical Image Editing task.
items.capZh: (c) 经典图像编辑任务的GEdit总体得分。

items.capEn: (d) IntelligentBench Score on Intelligent Editing task.
Figure 8: Comparison of models with different amounts of training tokens. We present cases of Text-to-Image generation and image editing.
items.capZh: 图8：不同训练token数量的模型比较。我们展示了文本到图像生成和图像编辑的案例。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Comparison of models with different amounts of training tokens. We present cases of intelligent editing that requires strong multimodal reasoning abilities.
items.capZh: 图9：不同训练token数量的模型比较。我们展示了需要强多模态推理能力的智能编辑案例。

items.en: Emerging properties have been studied extensively in the context of large visual or language models [81, 7]. In this work, situated within the scope of unified multimodal foundational models, we adopt a more focused definition for emerging properties:
items.zh: 涌现属性已在大型视觉或语言模型的背景下得到广泛研究[81, 7]。在这项工作中，处于统一多模态基础模型的范围内，我们对涌现属性采用了更聚焦的定义：

items.en: This qualitative shift, often referred to as a phase transition, denotes a sudden and dramatic change in model behavior that cannot be predicted by extrapolating from training loss curves [81]. Interestingly, we observe the similar phenomenon in unified multimodal scaling, where loss curves do not explicitly signal the emergence of new capabilities. Therefore, we investigate the emergence of model capabilities by evaluating performance across a range of tasks on historical checkpoints. Specifically, we report the average performance on standard VLM benchmarks as a proxy for multimodal understanding, the GenEval score for generation ability, and the GEdit score and IntelligentBench score to assess the model’s capability in naive and complex multimodal reasoning, respectively.
items.zh: 这种质的转变，通常被称为相变，表示模型行为中无法通过训练损失曲线外推预测的突然而剧烈的变化[81]。有趣的是，我们在统一多模态缩放中观察到类似现象，其中损失曲线并未明确指示新能力的涌现。因此，我们通过评估历史检查点上的一系列任务性能来研究模型能力的涌现。具体来说，我们报告标准VLM基准测试的平均性能作为多模态理解的代理，GenEval得分作为生成能力的代理，以及GEdit得分和IntelligentBench得分分别评估模型在简单和复杂多模态推理中的能力。

items.en: Interestingly, different tasks demonstrate distinct learning dynamics and saturation behaviors. If we choose the number of seen tokens required to reach 85% of peak performance as an indicator, as noted in Figure˜7, we find that conventional understanding and generation benchmarks saturate relatively early: at approximately 0.18T and 0.68T tokens, respectively. In contrast, editing tasks, which require both understanding and generation capabilities, exhibit slower convergence, reaching 85% performance only after 2.64T tokens.
items.zh: 有趣的是，不同任务表现出不同的学习动态和饱和行为。如果我们选择达到峰值性能85%所需的已见token数量作为指标，如图7所示，我们发现传统的理解和生成基准测试相对较早饱和：分别在大约0.18T和0.68T token处。相比之下，需要理解和生成能力的编辑任务收敛较慢，在2.64T token后才达到85%的性能。

items.en: Most notably, the Intelligent Edit task—designed to eliminate naive edit cases and emphasize on complex multimodal reasoning—requires 3.61T tokens to reach 85%, demonstrating a pattern akin to emergent behaviors described in [81]. In this setting, the model shows initially low performance that improves gradually and significantly after the 3T seen tokens. While traditional editing tasks remain largely unaffected by the resolution increase at 3T tokens, Intelligent Editing performance keeps improving significantly—from 15 to 45—tripling in later training stages and underscoring its dependence on unified multimodal reasoning. We further find that understanding ability, particularly visual input, plays a critical role in multimodal reasoning: removing the ViT tokens has minimal impact on GEdit-Bench but causes a 16% drop in Intelligent Edit, highlighting the importance of visual-semantic reasoning in complex editing tasks.
items.zh: 最值得注意的是，智能编辑任务——旨在消除简单编辑案例并强调复杂多模态推理——需要3.61T token才能达到85%，表现出类似于[81]中描述的涌现行为模式。在这种设置下，模型最初表现较低，在3T已见token后逐渐显著改善。虽然传统编辑任务在3T token处分辨率提高时基本不受影响，但智能编辑性能持续显著提升——从15到45——在后期训练阶段增加了两倍，突显了其对统一多模态推理的依赖。我们进一步发现，理解能力，特别是视觉输入，在多模态推理中起着关键作用：移除ViT token对GEdit-Bench影响最小，但导致智能编辑下降16%，突出了视觉语义推理在复杂编辑任务中的重要性。

items.en: While evaluation metrics may not linearly capture the model’s true capabilities—potentially leading to spurious signs of emergence, albeit unlikely—we further examine qualitative emerging behavior by inspecting generation outputs across different training checkpoints. As illustrated in Figure˜8, we observe trends consistent with the performance curves: generation quality is already strong before 1.5T seen tokens , with a small quality improvement after 3.0T seen tokens when trained with higher resolution. For text rendering, the ability to generate correct spell of "hello" and "BAGEL" emerge later—around 1.5T to 4.5T tokens.
items.zh: 虽然评估指标可能无法线性捕捉模型的真实能力——可能导致虚假的涌现迹象，尽管可能性不大——但我们通过检查不同训练检查点的生成输出进一步检查定性的涌现行为。如图8所示，我们观察到与性能曲线一致的趋势：在1.5T已见token之前，生成质量已经很强，在3.0T已见token后以更高分辨率训练时质量略有提升。对于文本渲染，正确拼写“hello”和“BAGEL”的能力在后期涌现——大约在1.5T到4.5T token之间。

items.en: The emerging behavior is also observed in the qualitative visualization of Intelligent Editing task in Figure˜9. Unlike traditional editing shown in Figure˜8, which involves only partial modifications to the input image, Intelligent Editing often requires generating entirely new concept based on multimodal reasoning. Prior to 3.5T tokens, the model tends to reproduce the input image with minimal changes—a fallback strategy when the task is not fully understood. However, after seeing 3.5T tokens, the model begins to demonstrate clear reasoning, producing coherent and semantically appropriate edits, aligning with the emergent behavior seen in Figure˜7.
items.zh: 这种涌现行为也在图9的智能编辑任务定性可视化中观察到。与图8所示的仅对输入图像进行部分修改的传统编辑不同，智能编辑通常需要基于多模态推理生成全新的概念。在3.5T词元之前，模型倾向于以最小改动复制输入图像——这是任务未被完全理解时的退守策略。然而，在观察到3.5T词元后，模型开始展现清晰的推理，生成连贯且语义恰当的编辑，与图7中观察到的涌现行为一致。

items.en: In this section, we present both quantitative and qualitative evaluations to examine the diverse multimodal capabilities of BAGEL. We begin with basic abilities on established benchmarks, including image understanding in Section˜7.1 and image generation in Section˜7.2. We then report performance on existing image editing benchmarks and IntelligentBench in Section˜7.3. In Section˜7.4, we explore generation and editing with explicit reasoning. In this setting, BAGEL is allowed to generate intermediate thinking steps before final outputs. We find that such reasoning significantly enhances performance. Finally, in Section˜7.5, we provide qualitative visualizations that showcase BAGEL’s world modeling abilities, including world navigation and video generation.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们通过定量和定性评估来考察BAGEL的多样化多模态能力。我们首先在既有基准上评估基础能力，包括第7.1节的图像理解和第7.2节的图像生成。然后，我们在第7.3节报告在现有图像编辑基准和IntelligentBench上的性能。在第7.4节，我们探索带有显式推理的生成和编辑。在这种设置下，BAGEL被允许在最终输出前生成中间思考步骤。我们发现这种推理显著提升了性能。最后，在第7.5节，我们提供定性可视化，展示BAGEL的世界建模能力，包括世界导航和视频生成。

items.en: We extensively benchmark BAGEL against state-of-the-art open-source multimodal models, including both specialized visual understanding and general-purpose unified models. Our evaluation spans a diverse set of public benchmarks to ensure a comprehensive assessment of model capabilities.
items.zh: 我们广泛地将BAGEL与最先进的开源多模态模型进行基准测试，包括专门的视觉理解和通用统一模型。我们的评估涵盖多样化的公开基准，以确保对模型能力的全面评估。

items.en: The visual understanding results are summarized in Table˜4. At a comparable activated parameter size of 7B, BAGEL outperforms existing unified models in understanding tasks. For instance, it achieves significant improvements of 14.3 and 17.1 points over Janus-Pro [11] on MMMU and MM-Vet, respectively. Notably, MetaQuery-XL [57] relies on a frozen, pre-trained Qwen2.5-VL [4] backbone, limiting its adaptability. Moreover, BAGEL delivers superior performance on most of these benchmarks when compared to specialized understanding models like Qwen2.5-VL and InternVL2.5 [12], demonstrating that our MoT design effectively mitigates task conflicts while maintaining strong visual understanding capabilities.
items.zh: 视觉理解结果总结在表4中。在7B可比较的激活参数规模下，BAGEL在理解任务上优于现有统一模型。例如，它在MMMU和MM-Vet上分别比Janus-Pro [11]提升了14.3和17.1个百分点。值得注意的是，MetaQuery-XL [57]依赖冻结的预训练Qwen2.5-VL [4]骨干网络，限制了其适应性。此外，与专门的视觉理解模型如Qwen2.5-VL和InternVL2.5 [12]相比，BAGEL在大多数基准上表现出更优的性能，表明我们的MoT设计有效缓解了任务冲突，同时保持了强大的视觉理解能力。

items.en: We evaluate visual generation performance on two benchmarks: GenEval and WISE. As shown in Table˜5, under the same evaluation settings as MetaQuery-XL, BAGEL achieves an 88% overall score, outperforming both specialized generation models (FLUX-1-dev: 82%, SD3-Medium: 74%) and unified models (Janus-Pro: 80%, MetaQuery-XL: 80%). Even without an LLM rewriter, BAGEL attains 82%, surpassing the previous SOTA unified model, Janus-Pro-7B. On the WISE benchmark, BAGEL exceeds all prior models except the leading private model, GPT-4o. It indicates that BAGEL has strong reasoning ability with world knowledge.
items.zh: 我们在两个基准上评估视觉生成性能：GenEval和WISE。如表5所示，在与MetaQuery-XL相同的评估设置下，BAGEL获得了88%的总分，优于专门的生成模型（FLUX-1-dev: 82%，SD3-Medium: 74%）和统一模型（Janus-Pro: 80%，MetaQuery-XL: 80%）。即使没有LLM重写器，BAGEL也达到了82%，超过了之前的SOTA统一模型Janus-Pro-7B。在WISE基准上，BAGEL超过了除领先的私有模型GPT-4o之外的所有先前模型。这表明BAGEL具有强大的推理能力和世界知识。

items.en: We conduct a qualitative comparison between BAGEL and Janus-Pro 7B, SD3-medium, and GPT-4o. As shown in Figure˜10, BAGEL generates significantly higher-quality images than Janus-Pro 7B and also surpasses the widely used specialist text-to-image model SD3-medium. Moreover, it natively supports prompts in both Chinese and English and allows generation at arbitrary aspect ratios.
items.zh: 我们对BAGEL、Janus-Pro 7B、SD3-medium和GPT-4o进行了定性比较。如图10所示，BAGEL生成的图像质量显著高于Janus-Pro 7B，也超过了广泛使用的专业文本到图像模型SD3-medium。此外，它原生支持中文和英文提示词，并允许以任意宽高比生成图像。

items.capEn: Figure 10: T2I qualitative comparison. Note that SD3-medium cannot take Chinese prompts so we translate them into English. For GPT-4o, we control the aspect ratio via text prompt. JanusPro can only generates square images.
items.capZh: 图10：T2I定性比较。注意SD3-medium不能接受中文提示词，因此我们将其翻译成英文。对于GPT-4o，我们通过文本提示词控制宽高比。JanusPro只能生成正方形图像。

items.en: We further evaluate the classical image editing capabilities of BAGEL using the GEdit-Bench [44]. As shown in Table˜7, BAGEL achieves results competitive with the current leading specialist image editing model Step1X-Edit [44], and also outperforms Gemini 2.0. Additionally, we report results on our newly proposed IntelligentBench in Table˜8, where BAGEL attains a performance of 44.944.9, significantly surpassing the existing open-source Step1X-Edit model by 3030.
items.zh: 我们进一步使用GEdit-Bench [44]评估BAGEL的经典图像编辑能力。如表7所示，BAGEL取得了与当前领先的专业图像编辑模型Step1X-Edit [44]相竞争的结果，并且也优于Gemini 2.0。此外，我们在新提出的IntelligentBench上报告了结果，如表8所示，BAGEL达到了44.9的性能，显著超过了现有的开源模型Step1X-Edit 30分。

items.en: We also provide qualitative comparisons across a diverse set of image editing scenarios in Figure˜11 and Figure˜12, benchmarking BAGEL against Gemini 2.0, GPT-4o, Step1X-Edit, and IC-Edit [99]. As illustrated, BAGEL consistently demonstrates superior performance over Step1X-Edit and IC-Edit, and also exceeds the capabilities of Gemini 2.0. While GPT-4o successfully handles these scenarios, it tends to introduce unintended modifications to the source images, an issue that BAGEL effectively avoids.
items.zh: 我们还在图11和图12中提供了跨多样化图像编辑场景的定性比较，将BAGEL与Gemini 2.0、GPT-4o、Step1X-Edit和IC-Edit [99]进行基准测试。如图所示，BAGEL始终表现出优于Step1X-Edit和IC-Edit的性能，并且也超过了Gemini 2.0的能力。虽然GPT-4o成功处理了这些场景，但它倾向于对源图像引入意外修改，而BAGEL有效避免了这一问题。

items.en: In this section, we validate the effectiveness of reasoning-augmented generation across various benchmarks from both quantitative and qualitative perspectives.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们从定量和定性两个角度验证了推理增强生成在各种基准上的有效性。

items.en: Generation with thinking. For Text-to-Image task, we evaluate Bagel on WISE with explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning process before generation. As shown in Table˜6, BAGEL with CoT achieves a score of 0.700.70, surpassing its non-CoT counterpart by 0.180.18, and also outperforms all existing open-source models by a significant margin (previous SOTA: MetaQuery-XL at 0.550.55). In addition to the quantitative evaluation, we provide visualizations in Figure˜13(a), where BAGEL fails to generate correct images when given only a short prompt, but succeeds when using the CoT-based thinking paradigm.
items.zh: 带思考的生成。对于文本到图像任务，我们在WISE上评估了BAGEL在生成前带有显式思维链（CoT）推理过程的表现。如表6所示，带有CoT的BAGEL得分为0.70，超过了其无CoT版本0.18分，并且也显著优于所有现有开源模型（先前SOTA：MetaQuery-XL为0.55）。除了定量评估，我们在图13(a)中提供了可视化，其中BAGEL在仅给出简短提示词时未能生成正确图像，但在使用基于CoT的思考范式时成功生成。

items.en: Editing with Thinking. As presented in Table˜8, incorporating CoT into BAGEL improves its Intelligent Score from 44.944.9 to 55.355.3. This performance gain is primarily attributed to the inclusion of reasoning, which enables the model to leverage world knowledge and provide detailed editing guidance. We further illustrate several representative cases from IntelligentBench in Figure˜13(b), where the tasks demand general knowledge or multi-step reasoning. In these scenarios, BAGEL demonstrates significantly improved image editing capabilities when guided by the thinking content.
items.zh: 带思考的编辑。如表8所示，将CoT融入BAGEL将其智能评分从44.9提升至55.3。这一性能提升主要归因于推理的加入，使模型能够利用世界知识并提供详细的编辑指导。我们进一步在图13(b)中展示了IntelligentBench中的几个代表性案例，这些任务需要常识或多步推理。在这些场景中，BAGEL在思考内容的引导下展现出显著提升的图像编辑能力。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Comparison on editing and manipulation tasks.
items.capZh: 图11：编辑和操作任务的比较。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Comparison on IntelligentBench. The results demonstrate that (i) BAGEL achieves performance comparable to Gemini 2.0, effectively handling complex cases that require multi-step reasoning and the incorporation of world knowledge; and (ii) Step1X-Edit fails to address certain instances, often producing outputs that closely resemble the input image, which may be attributed to its limited reasoning capabilities. Note that BAGEL results here are generated in thinking mode.
items.capZh: 图12：IntelligentBench上的比较。结果表明：(i) BAGEL取得了与Gemini 2.0相当的性能，有效处理了需要多步推理和世界知识的复杂案例；(ii) Step1X-Edit未能处理某些实例，通常生成与输入图像高度相似的输出，这可能归因于其有限的推理能力。注意，这里的BAGEL结果是在思考模式下生成的。

items.capEn: (a) Thinking Helps Generation: Text-to-Image Generation Cases
items.capZh: (a) 思考有助于生成：文本到图像生成案例

items.capEn: (b) Thinking Helps Generation: Image Editing Cases
items.capZh: (b) 思考有助于生成：图像编辑案例

items.en: To improve BAGEL’s world modeling ability for long-sequence visual generation, we fine-tune the model by increasing the proportion of video and navigation data in the training recipe. For navigation, we construct our dataset from video interleave sequences, annotating camera trajectories using ParticleSfM [101]. In Figure˜14, we demonstrate BAGEL’s world modeling capabilities, which include world navigation, rotation, and multi-frame generation.
items.zh: 为了提升BAGEL在长序列视觉生成方面的世界建模能力，我们通过增加训练配方中视频和导航数据的比例来微调模型。对于导航，我们从视频交错序列构建数据集，使用ParticleSfM [101]标注相机轨迹。在图14中，我们展示了BAGEL的世界建模能力，包括世界导航、旋转和多帧生成。

items.en: From the figure, BAGEL exhibits robust world understanding and simulation capabilities. It can follow input instructions to generate a dynamic number of images for tasks like navigating and rotating an input image, or produce multiple images based on a given prompt. Additionally, BAGEL demonstrates strong generalization in world understanding. For instance, while trained solely on real-world street navigation, it seamlessly extends to diverse domains such as ink paintings, cartoons, and video games.
items.zh: 从图中可以看出，BAGEL展现出强大的世界理解和模拟能力。它能遵循输入指令，为导航和旋转输入图像等任务生成动态数量的图像，或根据给定提示词生成多张图像。此外，BAGEL在世界理解方面表现出强大的泛化能力。例如，虽然仅在真实世界街道导航数据上训练，但它能无缝扩展到不同领域，如水墨画、卡通和视频游戏。

items.capEn: Figure 14: Examples of BAGEL in navigation, rotation, and multi-image generation.
items.capZh: 图14：BAGEL在导航、旋转和多图像生成中的示例。

items.en: Performance of BAGEL-1.5B. Figure˜16 compares the text-to-image (T2I) and image-editing performance of BAGEL-1.5B—with 1.5 B activated parameters—against JanusPro-7B and Step1X-Edit (12B). Although BAGEL-1.5B is considerably smaller, it surpasses both larger models on both tasks in terms of qualitative comparison. Moreover, the gap between BAGEL-1.5B and BAGEL-7B underscores the gains from model scaling, indicating a greater potential for even larger BAGEL variants.
items.zh: BAGEL-1.5B的性能。图16比较了BAGEL-1.5B（1.5B激活参数）与JanusPro-7B和Step1X-Edit（12B）在文本到图像（T2I）和图像编辑任务上的性能。尽管BAGEL-1.5B规模小得多，但在定性比较中，它在两项任务上都超过了这两个更大的模型。此外，BAGEL-1.5B与BAGEL-7B之间的差距凸显了模型规模扩展带来的收益，表明更大规模的BAGEL变体具有更大的潜力。

items.en: Failure cases. In Figure˜17 we present representative failure cases for BAGEL alongside other state-of-the-art models. Tasks that feature special IP generation, complex textual rendering, intricate human pose generation, or the simultaneous generation of multiple instances remain persistently challenging for contemporary text-to-image systems. For image editing, operations such as swapping object positions or simultaneously modifying a large amount of instances likewise challenge most existing models. In some complex scenarios, both BAGEL and Gemini 2.0 exhibit similar difficulties in adhering precisely to the given instructions. By contrast, GPT-4o delivers the most consistently successful results across all examples. Performance of BAGEL can be simply enhanced by scaling data with additional text-containing images, increasing model capacity, or applying RLHF [56] during the final post-training stage.
items.zh: 失败案例。在图17中，我们展示了BAGEL与其他最先进模型的代表性失败案例。涉及特殊IP生成、复杂文本渲染、复杂人体姿态生成或同时生成多个实例的任务，对当代文本到图像系统仍然具有持续挑战性。对于图像编辑，诸如交换对象位置或同时修改大量实例等操作同样挑战了大多数现有模型。在一些复杂场景中，BAGEL和Gemini 2.0在精确遵循给定指令方面都表现出类似的困难。相比之下，GPT-4o在所有示例中提供了最一致的成功结果。BAGEL的性能可以通过使用更多包含文本的图像扩展数据、增加模型容量或在最终后训练阶段应用基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）[56]来简单提升。

items.en: We presented BAGEL, a unified multimodal understanding and generation model that shows emerging capabilities when scaling up unified pretraining. BAGEL yields top-tier performance on standard multimodal understanding and generation benchmarks, and further distinguish itself with powerful world modeling and reasoning capabilities. In the hope of unlocking further opportunities for multimodal research, we open source BAGEL to the research community.
items.zh: 我们提出了BAGEL，一个统一的多模态理解与生成模型，在扩展统一预训练时展现出涌现能力。BAGEL在标准多模态理解和生成基准上取得了顶级性能，并进一步以其强大的世界建模和推理能力脱颖而出。为了为多模态研究解锁更多机会，我们将BAGEL开源给研究社区。
